custom_actions.name: metamask.perps.read_positions
custom_actions.description: core Read live Perps positions directly from the perps controller (HyperLiquid testnet, HTTP read-only) and return the selected subset.

market.description: Single market symbol, e.g. BTC or ETH. Alias: symbol.

mode.description: matching selects requested symbols; all selects every live item returned by the controller.

selector.description: Optional structured selector with mode, symbols/markets, and side.

account.description: EVM address to read positions for; defaults to MM_TEST_ACCOUNT_ADDRESS.

examples.description: Read every live position for the configured account

node.intent: Read Perps positions from the headless controller

custom_actions.proof_effect: E2E validation must record this action in trace.json; live-proof actions include liveAdapter/proofPath or controller output.
custom_actions.safety_notes: Read-only HyperLiquid testnet HTTP query; must not inject controller/UI state to fabricate proof.

custom_actions.description: core Read live Perps open orders directly from the perps controller (HyperLiquid testnet, HTTP read-only) and return the selected subset.

market.description: Single market symbol, e.g. BTC or ETH. Alias: symbol.

mode.description: matching selects requested symbols; all selects every live item returned by the controller.

selector.description: Optional structured selector with mode, symbols/markets, and side.

account.description: EVM address to read orders for; defaults to MM_TEST_ACCOUNT_ADDRESS.

examples.description: Read every live open order for the configured account

node.intent: Read Perps open orders from the headless controller

custom_actions.proof_effect: E2E validation must record this action in trace.json; live-proof actions include liveAdapter/proofPath or controller output.
custom_actions.safety_notes: Read-only HyperLiquid testnet HTTP query; must not inject controller/UI state to fabricate proof.

custom_actions.name: metamask.perps.read_account
custom_actions.description: core Read live Perps account state (balances, margin) directly from the perps controller (HyperLiquid testnet, HTTP read-only).

account.description: EVM address to read account state for; defaults to MM_TEST_ACCOUNT_ADDRESS.

examples.description: Read account state for the configured account

node.intent: Read Perps account state from the headless controller

custom_actions.proof_effect: E2E validation must record this action in trace.json; live-proof actions include liveAdapter/proofPath or controller output.
custom_actions.safety_notes: Read-only HyperLiquid testnet HTTP query; must not inject controller/UI state to fabricate proof.

custom_actions.name: metamask.perps.place_order
custom_actions.description: core Place a real Perps order on HyperLiquid testnet by driving the headless perps controller placeOrder() through the full signing/provider path. Testnet only Supports market (default) and resting limit orders (order_type=limit with price/offset_pct).

market.description: Single market symbol, e.g. BTC or ETH. Alias: symbol.

markets.description: Explicit list of market symbols (place_order requires exactly one).

selector.description: Optional structured selector with mode, symbols/markets, and side.

order_type.description: market (default) fills immediately; limit places a RESTING order at price/offset_pct that does not fill. Alias: orderType.

limit_price.description: Absolute resting limit price (limit orders). Takes precedence over offset_pct. Alias: price/limitPrice.

offset_pct.description: Resting limit price as a percent offset from live mid for limit orders (e.g. -30 = 30%% below mid for a non-filling BUY; default -30 buy / +30 sell). Alias: offsetPct.

account.description: EVM address to trade for; defaults to MM_TEST_ACCOUNT_ADDRESS.

examples.description: Place a small BTC long market order on testnet

node.intent: Place the requested Perps order via the headless controller

examples.description: Place a resting BTC limit BUY 30%% below mid on testnet (does not fill)

node.intent: Place a resting Perps limit order via the headless controller

custom_actions.proof_effect: E2E validation must record this action in trace.json; live-proof actions include liveAdapter/proofPath or controller output (order id, opened position).
custom_actions.safety_notes: Submits a REAL signed order to HyperLiquid testnet; must not mock the signer/provider or inject controller state to fabricate proof.

custom_actions.name: metamask.perps.close_positions
custom_actions.description: core Close selected live Perps positions on HyperLiquid testnet by driving the headless perps controller closePosition() through the full signing/provider path. Testnet only.

market.description: Single market symbol, e.g. BTC or ETH. Alias: symbol.

mode.description: matching selects requested symbols; all selects every live position.

selector.description: Optional structured selector with mode, symbols/markets, and side.

account.description: EVM address to close for; defaults to MM_TEST_ACCOUNT_ADDRESS.

examples.description: Close the BTC position on testnet

node.intent: Close selected Perps positions via the headless controller

custom_actions.proof_effect: E2E validation must record this action in trace.json; live-proof actions include liveAdapter/proofPath or controller output (positions absent after close).
custom_actions.safety_notes: Submits REAL signed close orders to HyperLiquid testnet; must not mock the signer/provider or inject controller state to fabricate proof.

custom_actions.name: metamask.perps.assert_positions
custom_actions.description: core Assert selected live Perps positions are present or absent via the headless controller standalone read path. Throws on mismatch.

market.description: Single market symbol, e.g. BTC or ETH. Alias: symbol.

mode.description: matching selects requested symbols; all selects every live position.

selector.description: Optional structured selector with mode, symbols/markets, and side.

account.description: EVM address to read for; defaults to MM_TEST_ACCOUNT_ADDRESS.

node.intent: Assert the expected Perps position state via the headless controller

custom_actions.proof_effect: E2E validation must record this action in trace.json; live-proof actions include liveAdapter/proofPath or controller output.
custom_actions.safety_notes: Read-only HyperLiquid testnet HTTP query; must not inject controller state to fabricate proof.

custom_actions.name: metamask.perps.ensure_positions
custom_actions.description: core Higher-level wrapper that reads selected positions, places or closes via the headless controller as needed, then asserts the final position state. Testnet only.

market.description: Single market symbol, e.g. BTC or ETH. Alias: symbol.

mode.description: matching selects requested symbols; all selects every live position.

selector.description: Optional structured selector with mode, symbols/markets, and side.

state.description: Desired selected position state to converge to.

amount.description: USD notional alias (used when placing to reach state open).

account.description: EVM address to trade for; defaults to MM_TEST_ACCOUNT_ADDRESS.

examples.description: Ensure no BTC position before the proof window

node.intent: Converge Perps positions to the requested state via the headless controller

custom_actions.proof_effect: E2E validation must record this action in trace.json; live-proof actions include liveAdapter/proofPath or controller output.
custom_actions.safety_notes: May submit REAL signed orders to HyperLiquid testnet; must not mock the signer/provider or inject controller state to fabricate proof.

custom_actions.name: metamask.perps.start_state
custom_actions.description: core Testnet only (the headless core adapter never mutates mainnet).Recommended configurable Perps start state that composes reusable domain operations before the proof window. Headless: converges POSITION and ORDER baselines on testnet via the controller; no navigation/page/HUD.

profile.description: Optional profile such as clean_market_testnet, open_position_testnet, open_order_testnet, or provider_mainnet_readonly.

positions.description: Desired position baseline or false to skip.

orders.description: Desired open-order baseline or false to skip.

node.intent: Prepare the Perps start state for the proof

examples.description: Start with an open ETH long position

custom_actions.safety_notes: Composes supported app/API paths and must not mutate React/Redux/MobX/DOM/local storage to fabricate proof.

custom_actions.name: metamask.perps.teardown_state
custom_actions.description: core Recommended configurable Perps teardown state that restores the selected environment after proof. Headless: converges POSITION and ORDER baselines on testnet via the controller; no navigation/page/HUD.

positions.description: Desired position baseline or false to skip.

orders.description: Desired open-order baseline or false to skip.

state_refs.name: perps.positions
state_refs.description: Normalized Perps position state read from the headless controller.

pre_conditions.description: Recipes must drive the real perps controller read path for proof state.

capability_notes: core is a headless adapter: it instantiates @metamask/perps-controller against a resolved MetaMask/core checkout and reads HyperLiquid testnet over HTTP. No CDP, bridge, or UI is involved. Slice 1 implements read-only perps actions. Slice 2 adds a default viem signer + write actions (place_order, close_positions, ensure_positions, assert_positions) that submit real signed orders to HyperLiquid testnet via the controller's full provider path.
